title: Sidebar tree component for pseudocode file navigation
purpose: Provides a collapsible file tree view for pseudocode files in the sidebar, supporting search and navigation functionality.
module_context: Exports a PseudoTreeBody component that consumes global sidebar tree state and renders a file tree using shared TreeNodeRenderer logic.

steps.content: Initialize an empty set to collect directory paths.
For each file in the input list, split its path into components.
For each component level, build a prefix path and add it to the set.
Convert the set of directory paths to an array and return it.
Extract collapse state and search query from the global sidebar store.
Extract the toggle function for pseudo paths from the global sidebar store.
Compute the project prefix with trailing slash if needed.
Create a function to convert absolute paths to relative paths.
Transform the file list into relative paths.
Build a mapping from relative paths to absolute paths.
Build a mapping from relative paths to file metadata.
Convert the current path to a relative path.
Create a navigation handler that maps relative paths back to absolute paths.
Build and sort the file tree from the relative paths.
Filter the tree based on the search query if present.
IF the file list is empty, render a message indicating no files.
ELSE IF no matches are found after filtering, render a message indicating no matches.
ELSE render the filtered tree nodes using the shared TreeNodeRenderer component.
Check if the absolute path starts with the project prefix.
IF the path starts with the prefix, remove the prefix to get the relative path.
ELSE return the absolute path unchanged.
Look up the absolute path for the given relative path in the mapping.
IF the absolute path is found, call the navigation handler with it.
ELSE call the navigation handler with the relative path directly.
